Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(44 comments)

Hello, Thanks for the merge request.
The code is good but the naming needs to be better in order to make it work in all situations.

Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

Hi, I am revising my code according to your comment. I find one issue as follow:
I tried to use "{{ .Values.global.busyBoxRepository }}/{{ .Values.global.busyBoxImage }}" but it seems invalid. Can you point me the values file which contains the value of the repository and image?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> Hi, I am revising my code according to your comment. I find one issue as follow:
> I tried to use "{{ .Values.global.busyBoxRepository }}/{{ .Values.global.busyBoxImage }}" but it seems invalid. Can you point me the values file which contains the value of the repository and image?

this is because mariadb galera doesn't have them per default, add them to global part of mariadb:
  busyBoxImage: busybox:1.30
  busyBoxRepository: docker.io

and they're not on "global" onap values.yaml so add them there two please!

Patch Set 1:

(7 comments)

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> (44 comments)
> 
> Hello, Thanks for the merge request.
> The code is good but the naming needs to be better in order to make it work in all situations.

Hi Sylvain,

Thanks for your reply on my recent questions. I just uploaded modified code for review. Below are my summary responding to your comments, which are already covered within the new code. All the comments are resolved accordingly, except for these comments:

----------------------
COMMENT:
----------------------
File kubernetes/common/mariadb-galera/resources/my-entrypoint.sh:

Patch Set #1, Line 40: value: my-user
{{- include "common.secret.envFromSecretFast" (dict "global" . "uid" (include "common.mariadb.secret.userCredentialsUID" .) "key" "login") | indent 12}}

Patch Set #1, Line 42: value: my-password
{{- include "common.secret.envFromSecretFast" (dict "global" . "uid" (include "common.mariadb.secret.userCredentialsUID" .) "key" "password") | indent 12}}

Patch Set #1, Line 44: value: "secretpassword"
{{- include "common.secret.envFromSecretFast" (dict "global" . "uid" (include "common.mariadb.secret.rootPassUID" .) "key" "password") | indent 12}}
----------------------
RESPONSE:
----------------------
I need to use the value of El Alto version rather than Frankfurt version
For these three comments, modifying the value of environment like suggestion is not appliacabled because they rely on mariadb-galera-db-user-credentials configmaps to exists. However, mariadb-galera-db-user-credentials only appears in the post-upgrade, and this script is executed in a pre upgrade process, where mariadb-galera-db-user-credentials is not ready yet. In this case, I use the same value as used in El Alto release as following:
- name: MYSQL_USER
          value: {{ default "" .Values.config.userName | quote }}
        - name: MYSQL_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ template "common.fullname" . }}
                  key: user-password
        - name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ template "common.fullname" . }}
                  key: db-root-password
---------------------
COMMENT
----------------------
Patch Set #1, Line 83: kubectl delete pvc -n onap {{ $.Release.Name}}-mariadb-galera-data-{{ $.Release.Name}}-mariadb-galera-0; 
trailing
you should use a range here:
{{- $global := . }}
{{ include "common.fullname" . }}-data
{{- range $i := until (int $global.Values.replicaCount)}}
kubectl delete pvc -n onap {{ include "common.fullname" $global }}-data-{{ $i }};
{{- end -}}

Patch Set #1, Line 84: kubectl delete pvc -n onap {{ $.Release.Name}}-mariadb-galera-data-{{ $.Release.Name}}-mariadb-galera-1; 
trailing

Patch Set #1, Line 85: kubectl delete pvc -n onap {{ $.Release.Name}}-mariadb-galera-data-{{ $.Release.Name}}-mariadb-galera-2; 
trailing
----------------
RESPONSE
----------------
Since this is inside of a bash, I use the for loop for the Ubuntu script as
for ((index=0;index<{{ $.Values.replicaCount }};index+=1)); do kubectl delete pvc "{{ include "common.fullname" . }}-data-{{ include "common.fullname" . }}-$index"; done;

Thank you.
Tri
